section.names: include\ the\ libcellml\ library\ in\ your\ project include_libcellml
section.title: Include the libCellML library in your project
section.paragraph: If you’ve followed the instructions for installing libCellML then the library is available for use as shown below. Note that this doesn’t invoke the libCellML namespace, so classes are accessed using the libcellml:: prefix.
In Python, the whole library can be imported at once, or classes can be imported individually as required.
section.literal_block: import libcellml from libcellml import Model, Component, Variable
